description: Shared definitions for product-market-research record schemas.

source_id.description: Unique source identifier: {platform}-{YYYYMMDD}-{sequential}. Lowercase alphanumeric platform code, date, zero-padded sequence.

currency.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code (uppercase). Use "unknown" when currency cannot be determined.

date_iso8601.description: ISO 8601 date: YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, or YYYY.

datetime_iso8601.description: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss±HH:mm or Z.

region.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 region code (uppercase). Use "unknown" when not determined.

record_version.description: Version number of this record. Starts at 1.

record_version_note.description: Reason for the latest version change.

price_type_source.description: Type of price observed or calculated.

price_type_listing.description: Type of price observed on a listing.

null_safe_string.description: String value. Use "unknown" when the value exists but was not observed; "not_applicable" when the field does not apply.

seller_type.description: Type of seller on a platform listing.
